metadata.description: Tools for authoring and validating HTML-first, agent-readable documentation (The Source-Complete Standard).

plugins.name: agentdocs
plugins.description: Author and validate HTML-first, agent-readable documentation following The Source-Complete Standard: one static HTML file, no view-time JS, faceted data-* tags, data-source/data-verified provenance, CSS-only tabs, and a front-door index.
